##LOCALITY=Tucson, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gordie Downs
##DESCRIPTION=White to colorless spheroidal crystals found in the pith of a living Saguaro cactus

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
